![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/2500x1600q2mtireapplicator2-1920x1152.webp)

# Q 

2 

M 

TIRE APPLICATOR

## Exterior / Accessories

### Tyre dressing applicators

Q²M Tire Applicator is designed to make tyre dressing application precise, clean and efficient. Its curved foam shape and firm grip allow controlled work on all tyre profiles, from low profile sport tyres to high wall SUV rubber.

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/11/productmain_1700x1645px_tire_applicator_big_2020-1024x991.png)

[Technical Details](#technical-details)

## Tyre dressing applicators

The applicator’s high density foam spreads tyre dressings evenly without excessive product use. Its ergonomic shape supports accurate application across the entire tyre sidewall, helping achieve a uniform finish while minimising waste.

what makes

Q2M TIRE APPLICATOR so special? 

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2020/12/rolls-royce-x-rs-x-gyeon-x-kaczy-107-683x1024.jpg)

Curved foam shape for precise tyre dressing application

## TECHNICAL DETAILS

![image](https://gyeon.co/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/860x640accessoriestireapplicator.webp)

BOX CONTAINS 

2 Tire Applicator - SMALL or LARGE 

## HOW TO USE

Q 

2 

M 

TIRE APPLICATOR

01
Choose the applicator size appropriate for the tyre profile. 

02
Apply tyre dressing directly onto the foam surface. 

03
Spread evenly across the tyre sidewall. 

04
Use controlled pressure for uniform coverage. 

05
Rinse or replace applicator after use if required. 

## FREQUENTLY ASKED
QUESTIONS

01
What is Q²M Tire Applicator used for? 

Applying tyre dressings evenly and precisely.

02
Why are two sizes available? 

Small is suited for low profile tyres, Large for high wall tyres.

03
Does it waste product? 

No, the foam structure helps distribute dressing efficiently.

04
Is it comfortable to use? 

Yes, the applicator offers a firm grip and ergonomic shape.

05
Can it be reused? 

Yes, with proper cleaning after use.

## Recommended Pairing

We recommend complementary products that perfectly match your current one, creating a complete and convenient KIT. Together, they deliver the best performance and a seamless user experience.
